allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d[0] if isinstance\(d,list\) and len\(d\)>0 else d, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rows=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else [d]; print\(json.dumps\(rows[0:2], indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\).__name__, len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:5]\)")
